batch_boundary: blue-api.morpho.org listed:true snapshot 2026-06-02 (mainnet = 73 listed vaults). Representative chain = Ethereum mainnet only; Base/other chains = separate multichain framework (explicit defer).
note: MetaMorpho ERC-4626 vault universe. ALL 73 listed mainnet vaults are COVER (concrete $to-keyed deposit/withdraw/mint/redeem manifests grouped by underlying; venue=metamorpho{vault=$to}, underlying asset baked). Each vault is a MetaMorphoFactory/MetaMorphoV1_1Factory child routed by exact (chainId,vault,selector) — its own callkey. Q1 long-tail promotion: the prior cover-batch was top-8-by-TVL; this round covers the full listed mainnet universe. Future newly-listed vaults = re-run the snapshot (or the documented source-resolver materialization).
